name: Swiss International PPT Image Template
description: Strict modular grid template for serious reports, technical overviews, and evidence-led PPT images.

page_types.name: Overview Grid
page_types.layout_archetype: left headline and takeaway, right numbered evidence/workflow grid

page_types.name: Timeline Grid
page_types.layout_archetype: numbered horizontal or vertical sequence with evidence notes

prompt_recipe.style: Swiss International grid, rational asymmetry, strong typographic hierarchy, red section numbering.
prompt_recipe.content_policy: No invented metrics, citations, dates, logos, or rankings. Keep unsourced data abstract.
prompt_recipe.text_policy: Chinese-first when user request is Chinese; include title, takeaway, section labels, and body copy.
